## Summary

Military-grade forensic investigation for any defect, drift, or unknown. Every action is a Search-and-Rescue transaction with declared Intent, expected…

## Description

Military-grade forensic investigation for any defect, drift, or unknown. Every action is a Search-and-Rescue transaction with declared Intent, expected Product, pre-flight checklist, return validation, and IFTTT failure branches. Mandates case folders, immutable Ground Zero, YAML metadata, parent/child transaction chains for backward trace, hypothesis ledger, and journalist-grade exhibits. Use for formal investigations, cross-surface bugs, incident dossiers, forensic reports, case logs, Ground Zero, chain of custody, SAR transactions, or when the user requires every move logged and grep-traceable backward to intake.

## Invoke

Use **forensic-case-investigation**.
